translation.SETUP_1:
If you are seeing this, it means this is your first time
    running this software (or some setting was wrong). Welcome! :)

    We are going to generate a .env file with all the credentials
    and configurations, but don't worry about specifics, this will be easy.

    Please note that you can modify the .env file manually and this setup
    will only show up when some setting is wrong. This process aims to help
    make sure every setting is correct.
translation.SETUP_STEP_1: STEP 1 - Create a Twitch Bot and get the ClientID and Client Secret
translation.SETUP_STEP_1_TEXT:
Let's start by opening Twitch Development console
        (Ctrl+click/Double click select + Right click copy):
translation.SETUP_STEP_1_AFTER_LINK:
Now click on "Register your Application" and fill out the following information:

        -Name: Choose any name you like, this will only be shown when asking for permissions later
        -OAuth Redirect URLs:
translation.SETUP_STEP_1_AFTER_REDIRECT_LINK:
(VERY IMPORTANT STEP)
        -Category: Chat Bot

    Once it is created, a table with all applications will appear. Click on "Manage"

    Here come the important steps:

        -Copy your Client ID and save it somewhere for later steps

        -Click on "New Secret", accept the alert and save that value somewhere
        safe. This value will only be shown once

    You will have a Client ID and a Client Secret ready to go!
translation.SETUP_STEP_1_CLIENT_ID_QUESTION: *********** Paste your Client ID with right click and press enter
translation.SETUP_STEP_1_CLIENT_SECRET_QUESTION: *********** Paste your Client Secret with right click and press enter
translation.SETUP_STEP_2: STEP 2 - Authorize your streamer user to work in your stream
translation.SETUP_STEP_2_TEXT:
We create an authorization request from previous information.
    Once the code is received, another petition will be automatically submitted
    to retrieve the Access Token and Refresh Token. It's all automatic, don't worry :)

    Login to your streamer channel, go to the following page and click on "Authorize".

    If it all went well, you will see a page that says "Authentication successful!"
translation.SETUP_STEP_2_LINK: Go to (Ctrl+click/Double click select + Right click copy):
translation.SETUP_STEP_2_BOT_QUESTION: Do you want to use a different user for your bot? (Y/n)
translation.SETUP_STEP_2_BOT_TEXT_1: Authorize your Bot account to work in your stream
translation.SETUP_STEP_2_BOT_TEXT_2:
Let's repeat but, before, login to your bot account.
        Then go to (Ctrl+click/Double click select + Right click copy):
translation.SETUP_STEP_3_TEXT:
At this point we already have access to Twitch API but we need some extra information:

    -Target Channel - The channel where this bot will be used, where you stream

    -Send authorization errors - Decide if you want to tell users when their command is unahtorized or say nothing

    -Rewards/Channel Points mode - This mode restricts the bot commands for streamer and
     mods and only allows actions to be sent via custom Rewards

    -Rewards mode with VIP privileges - Allows VIP users to bypass rewards and request directly via chat

    -Silence macro messages - This mode disables messages in chat from macros.
     Due to the potential complexity of macros it may spam the chat

    -Allow custom time signatures - This mode allows custom time signatures other than 4/4, only one per request.

    -Send MIDI Control Change on time signature change - You can provide a CC for the time signature
     numerator and denominator to send a MIDI CC message and sync your DAW on each change

    -Repetitions per loop - How many times each loop is played before moving to the next in queue
translation.SETUP_STEP_3_TARGET_CHANNEL_QUESTION: *********** Enter the Twitch channel where you stream
translation.SETUP_STEP_3_UNAUTHORIZED_MESSAGE_QUESTI: *********** Do you want to notify request authorization errors in chat? (y/N)
translation.SETUP_STEP_3_REWARDS_MODE_QUESTION: *********** Do you want to use Rewards/Channel Points mode instead of chat? (Y/n)
translation.SETUP_STEP_3_VIP_REWARDS_MODE_QUESTION: *********** For Rewards Mode, do you want VIP members to use commands freely and not need to redeem rewards? (Y/n)
translation.SETUP_STEP_3_SILENCE_MACRO_MESSAGES_QUES: *********** Do you want to silence Macro chat messages (to avoid chat message spam)? (Y/n)
translation.SETUP_STEP_3_ALLOW_CUSTOM_TIME_SIGNATURE: *********** Do you want to allow custom time signatures (disabled by default to avoid messing with metronome in DAW)? (y/N)
translation.SETUP_STEP_3_TIME_SIGNATURE_NUMERATOR_CC: *********** Enter a MIDI Control Change number for the time signature numerator changes (Default: 14)
translation.SETUP_STEP_3_TIME_SIGNATURE_DENOMINATOR_: *********** Enter a MIDI Control Change number for the time signature denominator changes (Default: 15)
translation.SETUP_STEP_3_REPETITIONS_PER_LOOP_QUESTI: *********** How many times do you want each loop to play before moving to the next in queue? (Default: 4)
translation.SETUP_STEP_4_TEXT:
For this application to work, you need a virtual MIDI device. If you use Windows, either
    one of these two should work flawlessly:

    loopMIDI (Default/ What I use) -
translation.SETUP_STEP_4_TARGET_MIDI_NAME_QUESTION: *********** Enter the name of the Virtual MIDI device to use (Default: loopMIDI Port)
translation.SETUP_STEP_4_TARGET_MIDI_CHANNEL_QUESTIO: *********** Enter the MIDI channel to use with your Virtual MIDI device (Default: 1)
translation.SETUP_STEP_END_READY:
Everything is ready, have fun!
    Feel free to modify the .env file at any time
translation.ERROR_BAD_ENV_VARIABLE_GENERIC: Some .env variables are wrong. Check the previous errors
translation.ERROR_INIT_ENV_VARIABLES:
Your .env file is not ready to use.
Probably this is your first time running the app, follow the next configuration steps :)
translation.ERROR_BAD_ENV_VARIABLE_1: This app cannot be executed, make sure you set a valid value for
translation.ERROR_BOT_PAUSED_DISCONNECTED: TwitchMIDI is disabled or paused right now. Wait until the streamer enables it :)
translation.ERROR_BOT_DISCONNECTED: TwitchMIDI is disabled right now. Enable it with !midion
translation.ERROR_BAD_MIDI_CHANNEL: Invalid MIDI channel, it must be between 1 and 16 (both inclusive)
translation.ERROR_BAD_MIDI_MESSAGE: Bad MIDI message, the value must be between 0 and 127 (inclusive)
translation.ERROR_BAD_BOOLEAN: Bad boolean value, the value must be either "true" or "false"
translation.ERROR_BAD_LOOP_REPETITIONS: Bad loop repetitions, the value must be between 1 and 32 (both inclusive)
translation.ERROR_BAD_MIDI_NOTE: Bad MIDI note, make sure you sent a valid note like C, F#, G...
translation.ERROR_INVALID_VOLUME: Please set a volume between 0% and 100%
translation.ERROR_INVALID_TIMEOUT_1: Please set a request timeout in seconds between
translation.ERROR_CHORD_PROGRESSION_BAD_INSERTION: Chord progression/loop could not be inserted. Try with a different alias or review the syntax. Syntax: alias/chordprogression
translation.ERROR_INVALID_CHORD: There is at least one invalid chord or the alias was not found:
translation.ERROR_MIDI_CONNECTION_ERROR: MIDI could not connect. Make sure your virtual MIDI device is active or review your settings (e.g. loopMIDI is open)
translation.ERROR_BAD_CC_MESSAGE: Bad Control Change message, please review your values. Controller/value must be between 0 and 127 (inclusive)
translation.ERROR_BAD_SWEEP_DELAY: Invalid control change sweep, make sure your delay times are in incremental order
translation.ERROR_BAD_PERMISSIONS: You don't have enough permissions to use this command. Sorry!
translation.ERROR_INIT: There was an initialization error. Please, close the app (Ctrl+C or close the terminal window)
translation.ERROR_INVALID_REWARD: Invalid MIDI command from reward, please review the configuration of this bot
translation.ERROR_DUPLICATE_REQUEST: This request is already queued, wait until the previous request is fulfilled
translation.ERROR_WAIT_FOR_REQUEST: You have another request in queue, wait until your request is fulfilled
translation.ERROR_TIMEOUT_REQUEST_1: You have already requested within the last
translation.ERROR_TIMEOUT_REQUEST_2: seconds. Wait some time to request again
translation.ERROR_INVALID_AFFIXES: Bad message leading or trailing content, it exceeds maximum length
translation.ERROR_COMMAND_MESSAGE_EMPTY: Bad request, please provide additional data to use this command. Use !midihelp for more info
translation.ERROR_INSTANCE_ALREADY_RUNNING: An instance of TwitchMIDI is already running. Only one instance can run at any given time. If you think this error shouldn't appear, delete the '.lock' file in the TwitchMIDI folder
translation.ERROR_BAD_CONFIG_DOWNLOAD:
At least one of your config files is invalid and TwitchMIDI cannot fix it automatically.
Please place the config files from a previous TwitchMIDI version
at 'config' folder or try later (GitHub is probably down right now) :/
translation.ERROR_INVALID_BAN_USER: Bad request, please provide a username to ban. Use !midihelp for more info
translation.ERROR_INVALID_UNBAN_USER: Bad request, please provide a username to unban. Use !midihelp for more info
translation.ERROR_RUNTIME_PERMISSIONS: Permissions file error. Not found or unable to read. Please, close TwitchMIDI, check your configuration and try again
translation.ERROR_INVALID_TIMESIGNATURE: Bad request, please provide a time signature with /1, /4, /8, /16 or /32 note length and an amount of notes less than 4 times the note length (e.g 4/4 valid, 17/4 invalid)
translation.ERROR_MULTIPLE_TIMESIGNATURE: Bad request, only one time signature per request is allowed
translation.ERROR_INVALID_WRONGREQUEST: The request you are trying to cancel has already played or you have not requested any loop yet
translation.HELP_MIDIHELP: Shows all commands available and info about each command. Syntax: command (e.g "sendloop")
translation.HELP_ADDCHORD: Adds a chord progression or loop with an alias. Syntax: name/chords or "rest" (chord length in quarter notes) (e.g. "pop/C G(2) Amin(2) F")
translation.HELP_REMOVECHORD: Removes a chord progression or loop with an alias. Syntax: alias (e.g. "pop")
translation.HELP_CHORDLIST: Shows all saved chord progressions or loops that can be used
translation.HELP_SENDNOTE: Sends a note, a set of notes building a chord or a melody. Syntax: note1 note2, note3 ... (e.g. "C4 E4 G4" or "C4, E4, G4")
translation.HELP_SENDLOOP: Sends a loop with an alias or with chords/rests. Syntax: [noteCount/noteValue] chord1 rest chord2(chord length in quarter notes)... (e.g. "[4/4] C G Amin F","pop")
translation.HELP_SENDCC: Sends a MIDI CC message with an alias, code or value sweeps. Syntax: controller value,controller2 value2(delay_in_ms) (e.g. "43 100,43 60","cutoff sweep","cutoff 100,cutoff 60","cutoff 100,cutoff 10(10000)")
translation.HELP_WRONGLOOP: Removes your last request from the queue
translation.HELP_CCLIST: Shows a list of available CC command macros (e.g. cutoff sweep)
translation.HELP_MIDIVOLUME: Sets the velocity for the chords/notes/loops. Syntax: value between 0 and 100 (e.g. "50","100")
translation.HELP_STOPLOOP: Stops the loop once it ends
translation.HELP_FULLSTOPMIDI: Stops all MIDI messages and sound
translation.HELP_SETTEMPO: Starts the MIDI clock and sets a tempo. Syntax: tempo (e.g. "120", "200")
translation.HELP_SYNCMIDI: Restarts the MIDI clock and syncs loop and clock on the next repetition
translation.HELP_MIDICURRENTREQUEST: Shows the current request being played
translation.HELP_MIDIREQUESTQUEUE: Shows the request queue for chord progressions and loops
translation.HELP_MIDIPAUSE: Pauses the requests but keeps playing whatever was already playing
translation.HELP_MIDIRESUME: Reactivates requests after they were paused with !midipause
translation.HELP_MIDIBANUSER: Blocks access to TwitchMIDI commands and rewards to a given username. Syntax: !midibanuser username
translation.HELP_MIDIUNBANUSER: Unblocks access to TwitchMIDI commands and rewards to a previously blocked user. Syntax: !midiunbanuser username
translation.HELP_MIDITIMEOUT: Sets a request timeout per user. Syntax: !miditimeout 15
translation.MIDIHELP_INVALID: 🟣TwitchMIDI available commands - Use "!midihelp yourcommand" for more info🟣:
translation.MIDION_REWARDS: Activating rewards... This may take a few seconds
translation.MIDIOFF_INIT: Disabling TwitchMIDI. Wait a few seconds...
translation.MIDIOFF_REWARDS: De-activating rewards... This may take a few seconds
translation.MIDIPAUSE: TwitchMIDI paused! - Now only the streamer can send commands and requests
translation.MIDIRESUME: TwitchMIDI resumed! - Go crazy with your requests!!! :D
translation.CHORDLIST_DEFAULT: 🔵Here is the list of saved chord progresison/loop🔵:
translation.CCLIST: 🟠Here is the list of saved Control Change (CC) actions🟠
translation.WRONGLOOP: Your last request was removed successfully!
translation.API_GENERIC_ERROR: Some error occurred when fulfilling this request
translation.API_SERVER_CONNECTION: TwitchMIDI Config API listening on port
